content: Based on what I've seen, here's the likely issue: Your OpenClaw config may still have Kimi as primary or in fallbacks. Try this: 1) Run: openclaw config set agents.defaults.model.primary ollama/llama3.1  2) Run: openclaw config set agents.defaults.model.fallbacks '[]'  3) Restart gateway. This forces local-only. The rate limits happen because it's still trying to use OpenRouter/Kimi instead of Ollama.
